place: Bophut Bay, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Four-Villa Beachfront Compound with Sixteen Pools, Bophut
blurb: A rare beachfront compound of four interconnecting villas on Bophut Bay — twenty en-suite bedrooms, sixteen private and infinity pools, direct sand access and a full concierge team, conceived for extended families, reunions and large groups who want an entire stretch of coast to themselves.
detail:
Set directly on the sand of Bophut Bay on Koh Samui's calm north coast, this is one of the island's largest private beachfront estates — four individually designed villas that can be booked together as a single gated compound for extended families, multi-generational celebrations and large groups of friends. Together they sleep up to forty guests across twenty en-suite bedrooms, with the flexibility to open or close wings to suit the party.

The estate's defining luxury is water: sixteen swimming and infinity pools thread between the villas and the beachfront, alongside expansive sun decks, shaded salas and lawns that run to the shoreline. Vast open-plan living and dining pavilions, multiple fully equipped kitchens and indoor-outdoor lounges give every group its own gathering space, while the absolute beachfront setting means warm, swimmable sea just beyond the deck.

A full resident team looks after the stay end to end — estate manager, private chefs, housekeeping, security and a dedicated concierge for transfers, excursions, in-villa dining and events. Daily breakfast, high-speed WiFi and the run of the grounds are included, with Fisherman's Village dining and Bophut's restaurants a short drive away and the airport around twenty minutes from the gate.
